description: Fix create_issue tool throwing raw Error instead of ToolError when repository ID cannot be determined.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/github && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace raw Error with ToolError.internal in create_issue
userStories.description: The create_issue tool throws `new Error('Could not determine repository ID')` instead of using ToolError.
acceptanceCriteria: The throw statement uses ToolError.internal('Could not determine repository ID') instead of new Error(...)
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/github/src/tools/create-issue.ts (fix error type)

Context:
Line 39:
```typescript
if (!repoId) throw new Error('Could not determine repository ID');
```

Change to:
```typescript
if (!repoId) throw ToolError.internal('Could not determine repository ID');
```

Ensure `ToolError` is imported. Check the existing imports — it may already be imported.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change any other code in this file
